name: infra-maintenance
description: Costa Rica owns costa_rica with port (level 1), market, and road enabled at T1. No army, no trade routes, no tributes. Expected per-tick infra maintenance: port(L1) = 0.1, market = 0.05, road = 0.02, total = 0.17/tick. costa_rica baseline production is ~0.70 wealth/tick, so net wealth delta after T1 ≈ +0.53/tick (0.70 − 0.17). Without infra the delta would be +0.70/tick. Confirms v0.40 infrastructure maintenance deduction in the army-upkeep loop extension.
